name: Chocolate Espresso Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan.
3. Mix flour, cocoa powder, espresso powder, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
4. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat until melted. Remove from heat.
5. Stir brown sugar and vanilla extract with a wooden spoon into the melted butter.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Stir in the flour mixture and chopped nuts until blended.
8. Spread batter evenly in the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until edges pull away from the sides of the pan. Cool on a wire rack.
10. For frosting: Melt butter and chocolate chips in a small saucepan over low heat (or microwave in a bowl on high for 1-1.5 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds).
11. Stir milk, vanilla extract, and confectioners' sugar until smooth. Refrigerate until cold, about 45 minutes.
12. When frosting is cold, beat with a whisk until pale and stiff.
13. Spread frosting on cooled bars. Let set for about 1 hour before cutting into bars.
